properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 8/15
NORWEGIAN SEA

1. ONE SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER IN THE PERIOD FROM FEBRUARY 7TH TO FEBRUARY 24TH 2015. 
THE LAUNCHING WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 17:00 HRS AND 24:00 HRS. LOCAL TIME WITHIN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.

SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING TWO HAZARD AREAS:

AREA 1: 
1. 69-31.8N 15-29.2E
2. 69-35.5N 16-00.6E
3. 69-25.3N 16-09.1E
4. 69-22.5N 15-39.5E
5. 69-31.8N 15-29.2E

AREA 2:
1. 70-42.0N 15-00.0E
2. 70-36.0N 09-30.0E
3. 72-00.0N 07-00.0E
4. 73-00.0N 08-00.0E
5. 73-42.0N 15-00.0E
6. 73-12.0N 18-00.0E
7. 71-18.0N 18-30.0E
8. 70-42.0N 15-00.0E

NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 02/15 REFERS
